title: Watching the Sunrise
content: While staying near the coast, Olivia woke up before dawn to watch the sunrise. The beach was quiet except for the sound of waves gently reaching the shore. As the sky slowly changed colors, shades of orange, pink, and gold appeared above the horizon. A few other visitors stood nearby, silently enjoying the view. Olivia took several photos but soon put her camera away to simply enjoy the moment. Watching the sun rise over the ocean became one of the most memorable experiences of her entire vacation.
